description_long: This is a modern, visually striking sofa with a two-tone color scheme, featuring a mustard yellow main body and contrasting black armrests. The sofa has two large, plush seat cushions and two matching back cushions, both in a textured yellow fabric. Two teal, patterned throw pillows add a pop of color and visual interest to the seating area. The armrests are asymmetrical, with one side rounded and the other more squared, both generously padded for comfort. The backrest is high and continuous, providing ample support, and the sofa stands on four short, dark wooden legs. The overall design is contemporary, with a playful mix of shapes and colors, making it suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or stylish outdoor waiting areas.
description: A modern, two-tone yellow and black sofa with plush cushions, teal throw pillows, and asymmetrical padded armrests, supported by four short dark legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two yellow seat cushions, two teal throw pillows, and both contrasting armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rounded yellow armrest, the depth of the seat, and the profile of the backrest and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous yellow backrest and the dark legs, with armrests visible at each end.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the black armrest, the teal pillow, and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching back cushions, both uniform in size, with two loose teal throw pillows placed symmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present and heavily padded, with the left armrest rounded and yellow, and the right armrest squared and black, both rising slightly above the seat height and providing a bold, asymmetrical profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, dark wooden legs positioned at the corners, with a simple, blocky design and slightly outward angles, fully exposed beneath the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a gentle curve, fully upholstered in yellow fabric, and no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid yellow fabric with a subtle woven texture on the main body and cushions, and solid black fabric on one armrest; teal throw pillows feature a fine, geometric pattern.
